Description: Name of the village or site where project activities are implemented
User-facing copy:
**Field Label:** Site name
 **Helper Text:** Enter the name of the site or village.
 **Hover Text:** We ask this to identify where each set of activities is taking place.
Helper Text: Enter the name of the site or village.
Hover Text: We ask this to identify where each set of activities is taking place.

Description: Central coordinate for the site
User-facing copy:
**Field Label:** GPS coordinates
 **Helper Text:** Provide the approximate central point of the site.
 **Hover Text:** We ask this to support spatial mapping and remote verification.
Helper Text: Provide the approximate central point of the site.
Hover Text: We ask this to support spatial mapping and remote verification.

Description: Optional narrative description of the site's location if GPS is not provided
User-facing copy:
**Field Label:** Site location description (optional)
 **Helper Text:** Describe where the site is located, especially if GPS is not available. Include landmarks or nearby villages.
 **Hover Text:** This helps verify and distinguish sites if shapefiles or coordinates are not uploaded.
Helper Text: Describe where the site is located, especially if GPS is not available. Include landmarks or nearby villages.
Hover Text: This helps verify and distinguish sites if shapefiles or coordinates are not uploaded.

Description: Optional first-level administrative unit (e.g. Region, County, State) if GPS or shapefile is uploaded
User-facing copy:
**Field Label:** First-level administrative unit (optional)
 **Helper Text:** Include this only if not covered by GPS or shapefile.
 **Hover Text:** This field is optional if geospatial data has already been provided.
Helper Text: Include this only if not covered by GPS or shapefile.
Hover Text: This field is optional if geospatial data has already been provided.

Description: Optional second-level administrative unit (e.g. District, Sub-county) if GPS or shapefile is uploaded
User-facing copy:
**Field Label:** Second-level administrative unit (optional)
 **Helper Text:** Include this only if not covered by GPS or shapefile.
 **Hover Text:** We use this when coordinates aren’t available to help locate the site.
Helper Text: Include this only if not covered by GPS or shapefile.
Hover Text: We use this when coordinates aren’t available to help locate the site.

Description: Optional third-level administrative unit (e.g. Ward, Parish, Village cluster) if GPS or shapefile is uploaded
User-facing copy:
**Field Label:** Third-level administrative unit (optional)
 **Helper Text:** Include this only if GPS or shapefiles are missing.
 **Hover Text:** This field supports mapping and local analysis if no other geospatial data is provided.
Helper Text: Include this only if GPS or shapefiles are missing.
Hover Text: This field supports mapping and local analysis if no other geospatial data is provided.

Description: Approximate size of the site in hectares
User-facing copy:
**Field Label:** Hectare coverage
 **Helper Text:** Enter the total area covered by the site.
 **Hover Text:** We ask this to measure implementation area at the site level.
Helper Text: Enter the total area covered by the site.
Hover Text: We ask this to measure implementation area at the site level.

User-facing copy:
**Field Label:** Ecological zone(s)
 **Helper Text:** Select one or more ecosystem types that apply to this site.
 **Hover Text:** You can skip this if the site's ecological zone is the same as your project-wide ecological zone.
Helper Text: Select one or more ecosystem types that apply to this site.
Hover Text: You can skip this if the site's ecological zone is the same as your project-wide ecological zone.

Description: Estimated population living in or around the site
User-facing copy:
**Field Label:** Estimated population
**Helper Text:** Provide the approximate number of people living in or around this site. Use the most recent census or local government data if available.
**Hover Text:** We ask this to understand the scale of the community potentially impacted or engaged by the project.
Helper Text: Provide the approximate number of people living in or around this site. Use the most recent census or local government data if available.
Hover Text: We ask this to understand the scale of the community potentially impacted or engaged by the project.

Description: Estimated gender breakdown of the site population
User-facing copy:
**Field Label:** Gender distribution
 **Helper Text:** Provide an estimated breakdown of the population by gender (e.g. % women, % men, % other/unknown). Use census data if available.
 **Hover Text:** We ask this to support inclusive planning and to disaggregate findings in future analysis.
Helper Text: Provide an estimated breakdown of the population by gender (e.g. % women, % men, % other/unknown). Use census data if available.
Hover Text: We ask this to support inclusive planning and to disaggregate findings in future analysis.

Description: Estimated breakdown of the population by age group
User-facing copy:
**Field Label:** Age distribution
 **Helper Text:** Provide the percentage of people in each age group (e.g. 0–14, 15–24, 25–64, 65+). Use official data if available.
 **Hover Text:** We ask this to understand the demographic structure and design age-responsive engagement.
Helper Text: Provide the percentage of people in each age group (e.g. 0–14, 15–24, 25–64, 65+). Use official data if available.
Hover Text: We ask this to understand the demographic structure and design age-responsive engagement.

Description: Ethnic groups present in the site community
User-facing copy:
**Field Label:** Ethnic groups present
 **Helper Text:** List all known ethnic or cultural groups present at this site.
 **Hover Text:** We ask this to ensure culturally inclusive engagement and context awareness.
Helper Text: List all known ethnic or cultural groups present at this site.
Hover Text: We ask this to ensure culturally inclusive engagement and context awareness.

Description: Whether marginalised or vulnerable groups are present
User-facing copy:
**Field Label:** Are vulnerable groups present?
 **Helper Text:** Select yes if specific groups face social, economic, or health-related vulnerabilities.
 **Hover Text:** We ask this to plan for inclusion and safeguard those most at risk.
Helper Text: Select yes if specific groups face social, economic, or health-related vulnerabilities.
Hover Text: We ask this to plan for inclusion and safeguard those most at risk.

Description: Types of vulnerability observed in the site. Options: Food insecurity, Inadequate housing, Limited access to healthcare, Limited access to education, Lack of income or employment, Physical disability, Lack of identification or legal status, Gender-based marginalisation, Youth exclusion or unemployment, Elderly isolation, None identified, Other (please specify).
User-facing copy:
**Field Label:** What kinds of vulnerability are common?
 **Helper Text:** Select any social or economic challenges widely experienced in this community; for example, food insecurity, inability to afford healthcare, poor housing, or social exclusion.
 **Hover Text:** We ask this to help identify equity and access issues that could shape your engagement, risk management, or benefit-sharing strategy.
Field Label: What kinds of vulnerability are common?
Helper Text: Select any social or economic challenges widely experienced in this community; for example, food insecurity, inability to afford healthcare, poor housing, or social exclusion.
Hover Text: We ask this to help identify equity and access issues that could shape your engagement, risk management, or benefit-sharing strategy.

Description: General level of education in the site community. Options: Most have not completed primary school, Most completed primary school, Mixed primary and secondary, Most completed secondary school, Many have vocational or technical training, Some have college or university education, Unknown.
User-facing copy:
**Field Label:** Education profile
 **Helper Text:** Select the option that best describes the general education level of people in this site. Think about what most adults or youth have achieved.
 **Hover Text:** We ask this to help tailor how we engage with the community and support learning or data collection activities.
Helper Text: Select the option that best describes the general education level of people in this site. Think about what most adults or youth have achieved.
Hover Text: We ask this to help tailor how we engage with the community and support learning or data collection activities.

Description: Main livelihood activities in the site community. Options: Subsistence farming, Commercial agriculture, Livestock keeping, Fishing, Timber harvesting, Charcoal production, Mining or quarrying, Crafts or artisanal work, Small business or trade, Public sector work (e.g. teaching, health), Tourism-related income, Day labour or seasonal work, Remittances, None, Other (please specify).
User-facing copy:
**Field Label:** Main sources of income
 **Helper Text:** Select the most common income-generating activities in this site.
 **Hover Text:** We ask this to understand the community’s economic base and identify dependency on natural resources.
Helper Text: Select the most common income-generating activities in this site.
Hover Text: We ask this to understand the community’s economic base and identify dependency on natural resources.

Description: Additional or seasonal income sources in the site community. Options: Subsistence farming, Commercial agriculture, Livestock keeping, Fishing, Timber harvesting, Charcoal production, Mining or quarrying, Crafts or artisanal work, Small business or trade, Public sector work (e.g. teaching, health), Tourism-related income, Day labour or seasonal work, Remittances, None, Other (please specify).
User-facing copy:
**Field Label:** Other income sources (optional)
 **Helper Text:** Select any additional or seasonal sources of income. This could include charcoal production, remittances, or informal trade.
 **Hover Text:** We ask this to build a fuller picture of livelihood diversity and economic resilience in the site.
Helper Text: Select any additional or seasonal sources of income. This could include charcoal production, remittances, or informal trade.
Hover Text: We ask this to build a fuller picture of livelihood diversity and economic resilience in the site.

Description: Typical amount of land cultivated per household. Options: None, 0.5 hectares or less, 0.5–2 hectares, 2–5 hectares, More than 5 hectares, Highly variable, Unknown.
User-facing copy:
**Field Label:** Average land cultivated per household
 **Helper Text:** Choose the range that best represents land use in this site.
 **Hover Text:** We ask this to assess land pressure and agricultural dependency.
Helper Text: Choose the range that best represents land use in this site.
Hover Text: We ask this to assess land pressure and agricultural dependency.

Description: Crops commonly grown in the site area. Options: Maize, Upland rice, Paddy rice, Cassava, Millet, Sorghum, Sesame, Groundnuts, Sunflower, Cashew, Soybean, Tobacco, Beans, Pigeon pea, Horticultural crops (e.g. tomato, onion), Banana or plantain, Sugarcane, Other (please specify).
User-facing copy:
**Field Label:** Crops grown
 **Helper Text:** List all major crops cultivated in this community.
 **Hover Text:** We ask this to understand local food systems and agricultural practices.
Helper Text: List all major crops cultivated in this community.
Hover Text: We ask this to understand local food systems and agricultural practices.

Description: Types and quantity bands of livestock kept by households in the site. Types: Cattle, Goats, Sheep, Pigs, Chickens, Donkeys, Ducks or geese, Other (please specify). Quantity bands: None, 1–15, 16–30, More than 30, Unknown. Use a structured format to show livestock type and estimated ownership range.
User-facing copy:
**Field Label:** Livestock kept
 **Helper Text:** For each livestock type, select the estimated number typically kept per household. Use the best available local knowledge or survey data.
 **Hover Text:** We ask this to understand economic strategies, grazing pressure, and potential livestock–wildlife interactions.
Helper Text: For each livestock type, select the estimated number typically kept per household. Use the best available local knowledge or survey data.
Hover Text: We ask this to understand economic strategies, grazing pressure, and potential livestock–wildlife interactions.

Description: Whether wildlife–human conflict is an issue at the site
User-facing copy:
**Field Label:** Is there human–wildlife conflict at this site?
 **Helper Text:** Select yes if conflict with wild animals (e.g., elephants, baboons) is known to occur.
 **Hover Text:** We ask this to understand risks to livelihoods, food security, and safety.
Field Label: Is there human–wildlife conflict at this site?
Helper Text: Select yes if conflict with wild animals (e.g., elephants, baboons) is known to occur.
Hover Text: We ask this to understand risks to livelihoods, food security, and safety.

Description: Summary of wildlife–human conflict per species. Each entry pairs an animal type with a frequency level. Species options: Elephants, Baboons, Bush pigs, Monkeys, Birds, Crocodiles, Hippos, Lions, Other (please specify). Frequency options: Rare, Occasional, Frequent, Constant, Unknown.
User-facing copy:
**Field Label:** Wildlife conflict summary
 **Helper Text:** For each species causing conflict, select how frequently it occurs. Use your own experience or community reports.
 **Hover Text:** We ask this to prioritise response planning and understand the nature and severity of human–wildlife conflict at this site.
Helper Text: For each species causing conflict, select how frequently it occurs. Use your own experience or community reports.
Hover Text: We ask this to prioritise response planning and understand the nature and severity of human–wildlife conflict at this site.
